prompt: Using the provided reference image as the base, remove the solid censor block covering the face and realistically reconstruct the hidden face as Claire Redfield from Resident Evil. Keep the existing close-up composition, wet dark ponytail, red leather jacket collar, moody cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, and grey background continuous with the reference. Make the final portrait ultra-photorealistic and high-detail, with a serious direct gaze, natural skin texture, loose strands of hair across the face, subtle makeup, defined brows, full lips, and striking blue eyes. Reframe only enough to create a clean square head-and-shoulders poster-style portrait, while preserving the same gritty realistic survival-horror mood. Do not add text, logos, borders, extra characters, or stylized illustration effects.
